subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta, et al, spoken on 1919-12-30
subcodes.first_line: They have asked if it is possible for a person to reach the station of Christ - whoever suffers or prays, can he reach this station?... Any person progresses in his own degree.
subcodes.subjects: @progress only takes place within its own degree, @station of the Manifestation of God, @differences in human capacity, @Primal Will and the Word; Remembrance; Manifestation of God
